## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Sierra Straube for the Client Operations Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role:** GrowthX needs a Client Operations Manager to scale its delivery org, which is onboarding \~2 clients/week. The role's top priority is implementing a project management tool for capacity planning, cost tracking, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [**Candidate:** Sierra Straube has a strong background building CS Ops from scratch at startups (Brightwheel, Resilience), with deep experience in Gainsight implementation, process automation, and change management.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Fit:** Sierra's experience directly matches GrowthX's needs. Her "85/15 rule" for tool implementation and automated sales-to-CS handoff are specific examples of the operational efficiency GrowthX is seeking.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge at GrowthX

  - [**Context:** GrowthX is a 1-year-old services business scaling rapidly, onboarding \~2 clients/week.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [**Problem:** The delivery org's current structure is not scalable. Hiring this role is a key part of a reorg to improve efficiency and cost tracking, a priority for investors.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [**Goal:** Implement a formal project management tool to enable:](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [Capacity planning](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [Cost tracking](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
      - [Progress tracking against contractual deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [Automated reporting](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Future:** The role will also support the launch of a new self-serve product platform, offering significant growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### Sierra Straube's Experience & Approach

  - [**Career Path:** Customer Support → Customer Success (Brightwheel) → CS Ops Manager (Resilience).](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Brightwheel:** Developed a webinar series to segment new clients into high-touch vs. low-touch onboarding paths, directly leading to the creation of an ops role.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [**Resilience:** As the second CS hire, built the entire CS Ops function from the ground up, focusing on scalable processes and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Key Projects & Methodologies

  - [**Gainsight Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Led implementation as a first-time administrator, learning the tool while simultaneously training the team.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Managed change with a weekly demo/SOP cadence and an "85/15 rule":](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
          - [Build features to 85% completion.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
          - [Demo for team feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
          - [Finalize based on input to ensure the tool serves end-users.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Automated Sales-to-CS Handoff:**](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
      - [Partnered with Sales Ops to automate the handoff process from email to a HubSpot ticketing queue.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [**Result:** Eliminated friction and information loss by providing CSMs with all necessary client context immediately upon deal close.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**Customer Feedback Loop:**](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Built a HubSpot ticketing system for CSMs to capture client feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Analyzed monthly data to inform product roadmap decisions, reprioritizing features based on client need.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Churn & Renewal Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Led monthly sessions using product usage and churn risk data to identify trends and apply learnings across the team's accounts, improving renewal rates.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Evaluate Sierra Straube's candidacy and determine next steps in the hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/fmprjQqp_2ixHpe5gfio7wVH_cv37WJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
